                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value.       <max value="1"/>

        <max value="1"/>

        <path value="EntryRelationship.typeCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="COMP"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xActRelationshipEntryRelationship"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.inversionInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.negationInd">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.negationInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>

      </type>
    </element>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.typeId.root">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.typeId.extension">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.templateId">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.templateId"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="root"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="2"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>

             id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.templateId:iheSpecimenReceived">

      <sliceName value="iheSpecimenReceived"/>
      <definition

      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>

      <type>

      </type>
    </element>

      <sliceName value="frEchantillonDateReception"/>

                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xActClassDocumentEntryAct|2.0.0"/>

    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.nullFlavor">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.code">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.code"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="SPRECEIVE"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.codeSystem">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.codeSystem"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System"/>
      <definition value="Specifies the code system that defines the code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystem"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <patternString value="1.3.5.1.4.1.19376.1.5.3.2"/>
    </element>

      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.codeSystemName"/>

      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

      </type>

    </element>

      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.codeSystemVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

      <max value="1"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

      </type>
    </element>

      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.displayName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Display Name"/>

      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.displayName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

        <code value="string"/>
        <profile

      </type>
      <patternString value="Échantillon reçu"/>
    </element>

      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSet"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSet extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>

    </element>

      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InFulfillmentOf1"/>

      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.procedure">

      <base>

        <max value="*"/>

                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">

      </extension>

      </extension>

  </snapshot>
  <differential>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="root"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <min value="2"/>
      <max value="2"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId:iheSpecimenCollection">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="iheSpecimenCollection"/>
      <short value="Conformité Specimen Collection (IHE PaLM)"/>
      <definition value="Conformité Specimen Collection (IHE PaLM)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId:iheSpecimenCollection.root">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId.root"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.3.1.2"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId:frPrelevement">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="frPrelevement"/>
      <short value="Conformité FR-Prelevement (CI-SIS)"/>
      <definition value="Conformité FR-Prelevement (CI-SIS)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.templateId:frPrelevement.root">
      <path value="Procedure.templateId.root"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.77"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.classCode">
      <path value="Procedure.classCode"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.moodCode">
      <path value="Procedure.moodCode"/>
      <patternCode value="EVN"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.code">
      <path value="Procedure.code"/>
      <short
             value="Acte de prélèvement - Pour un prélèvement en vue d'examen de biologie médicale, le code affiné NABM de l'acte de prélèvement doit être renseigné si connu, sauf dans le cas d'un recueil d'échantillon effectué par le patient lui-même. Un prélèvement cytologique ou de tissu en vue d'un examen d'anatomie ou de cytologie pathologiques est codé à l'aide d'une nomenclature précisée dans les modèles de contenus métiers.Par défaut, utiliser le code suivant : code='33882-2' displayName='Prélèvement' codeSystem='2.16.840.1.113883.6.1' codeSystemName='LOINC'"/>
      <definition value="Acte de prélèvement"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.code.code">
      <path value="Procedure.code.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.code.codeSystem">
      <path value="Procedure.code.codeSystem"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.code.displayName">
      <path value="Procedure.code.displayName"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.effectiveTime">
      <path value="Procedure.effectiveTime"/>
      <short
             value="Date du prélèvement: La date et heure de prélèvement doit être renseignée si elle est connue. En cas d'acte ponctuel, c'est la date et heure de fin (élément high) qui horodate le prélèvement. "/>
      <definition value="Date du prélèvement"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode"/>
      <short
             value="Localisation du prélèvement SNOMED CT (2.16.840.1.113883.6.96)"/>
      <definition value="Localisation du prélèvement"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.originalText.mediaType">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.originalText.mediaType"/>
      <min value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.originalText.reference">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.originalText.reference"/>
      <min value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.originalText.reference.value">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.originalText.reference.value"/>
      <min value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier"/>
      <short value="Précision topographique"/>
      <definition value="Précision topographique"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.code">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.code"/>
      <patternCode value="106233006"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.codeSystem">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.codeSystem"/>
      <patternString value="2.16.840.1.113883.6.96"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.codeSystemName">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.codeSystemName"/>
      <patternString value="SNOMED-CT"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.displayName">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.name.displayName"/>
      <patternString value="modificateur topographique"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.value">
      <path value="Procedure.targetSiteCode.qualifier.value"/>
      <short value="Valeur de la topographie"/>
      <definition value="Valeur de la topographie"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-modificateur-topographique-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.performer">
      <path value="Procedure.performer"/>
      <short value="Organisation prélevante"/>
      <definition value="Organisation prélevante"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Performer2"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-performer-corps"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.participant">
      <path value="Procedure.participant"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="typeCode"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.participant:EchantillonPreleve">
      <path value="Procedure.participant"/>
      <sliceName value="EchantillonPreleve"/>
      <short value="Échantillon prélevé"/>
      <definition value="Échantillon prélevé"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.participant:EchantillonPreleve.typeCode">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="PRD"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.participant:EchantillonPreleve.participantRole.classCode">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.participantRole.classCode"/>
      <patternCode value="SPEC"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.participant:EchantillonPreleve.participantRole.id">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.participantRole.id"/>
      <short
             value="Identifiant de l'échantillon - L'identifiant de l'échantillon est éventuellement multiple (premier identifiant attribué par le préleveur, puis réidentification par le laboratoire).  L'un des identifiants est visible sur l'échantillon matériel (par exemple en code barre sur le tube ou le bocal). "/>
      <definition value="Identifiant de l'échantillon"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.participant:EchantillonPreleve.participantRole.playingEntity">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.participantRole.playingEntity"/>
      <min value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.participant:EchantillonPreleve.participantRole.playingEntity.code">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.participantRole.playingEntity.code"/>
      <short value="Nature de l'échantillon"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-specimen-type-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.participant:EchantillonPreleve.participantRole.playingEntity.quantity">
      <path
            value="Procedure.participant.participantRole.playingEntity.quantity"/>
      <short
             value="La quantité est exprimée en valeur (@value) et unité de mesure (@unit). Si le volume est renseigné alors les deux attributs value et unit doivent être valorisés."/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.participant:DispositifUtilise">
      <path value="Procedure.participant"/>
      <sliceName value="DispositifUtilise"/>
      <short value="Dispositif utilisé"/>
      <definition value="Dispositif utilisé"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.participant:DispositifUtilise.typeCode">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="DEV"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.participant:DispositifUtilise.participantRole.classCode">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.participantRole.classCode"/>
      <patternCode value="MANU"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.participant:DispositifUtilise.participantRole.playingDevice">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.participantRole.playingDevice"/>
      <min value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.participant:DispositifUtilise.participantRole.playingDevice.code">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.participantRole.playingDevice.code"/>
      <short
             value="Code du dispositif - Par exemple 'Trousse de détection HPV' "/>
      <definition value="Code du dispositif"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.participant:ProduitUtilise">
      <path value="Procedure.participant"/>
      <sliceName value="ProduitUtilise"/>
      <short value="Produit utilisé"/>
      <definition value="Produit utilisé"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.participant:ProduitUtilise.typeCode">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="CSM"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.participant:ProduitUtilise.participantRole.classCode">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.participantRole.classCode"/>
      <patternCode value="ADTV"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.participant:ProduitUtilise.participantRole.playingDevice">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.participantRole.playingDevice"/>
      <min value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.participant:ProduitUtilise.participantRole.playingDevice.code">
      <path value="Procedure.participant.participantRole.playingDevice.code"/>
      <short
             value="Code du produit - Par exemple 'Milieu' pour le test HPV "/>
      <definition value="Code du produit"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeCode">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="COMP"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act"/>
      <min value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.templateId">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.templateId"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="root"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="2"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.templateId:iheSpecimenReceived">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="iheSpecimenReceived"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.templateId:frEchantillonDateReception">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="frEchantillonDateReception"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.classCode">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.classCode"/>
      <patternCode value="ACT"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.moodCode">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.moodCode"/>
      <patternCode value="EVN"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.code">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.code"/>
      <patternCode value="SPRECEIVE"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.codeSystem">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.codeSystem"/>
      <patternString value="1.3.5.1.4.1.19376.1.5.3.2"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.codeSystemName">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.codeSystemName"/>
      <patternString value="IHEActCode"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.displayName">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.code.displayName"/>
      <patternString value="Échantillon reçu"/>
    </element>
    <element id="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.effectiveTime">
      <path value="Procedure.entryRelationship.act.effectiveTime"/>
      <short value="Date de réception de l'échantillon"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
  </differential>
</StructureDefinition>
